allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\Demo Website\\ERP"; $env:NODE_ENV = "production"; npx next build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 40)

PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\Demo Website\\ERP"; Get-ChildItem .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Remove-Item .next -Force -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Cleared"; $output = npx next build 2>&1; $output | Select-Object -Last 25)
PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object CPU -gt 5 | ForEach-Object { "PID:$\($_.Id\) CPU:$\([math]::Round\($_.CPU,0\)\)s" })

PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\Demo Website\\ERP"; Get-ChildItem -Path ".next" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path ".next" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Cache cleared"; $output = npx next build 2>&1; $output | Select-Object -Last 20)
